reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/supplication (dua) asking for peace from Allah. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: اللّهُـمَّ أَنْـتَ السَّلامُ ، وَمِـنْكَ السَّلام ، تَبارَكْتَ يا ذا الجَـلالِ وَالإِكْـرام . 628
